subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou verily knowest that all the servants have united to humble me, whilst Thou hast strengthened them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انک لتعلم بان العباد کلهم اتفقوا علی ذلتی و انت ایدتهم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the cloud ['ama], @servitude; submission to God; repentance
